installCommand: npm install --include=dev && npm install --prefix server --include=dev && npm install --prefix client --include=dev
buildCommand: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https://photon.komoot.io https://server.arcgisonline.com; font-src 'self'; frame-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
